summary: Iteration 18 Testing Complete - BIQC Global Fact Authority Enhancements Verified. All 23 backend tests passed. New features: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (0.75), INTEGRATION_FACT_DERIVATIONS mapping, resolve_facts reads observation_events, persist_facts_batch for batch persistence, build_known_facts_prompt separates CONFIRMED vs UNCONFIRMED facts, log_fact_resolution_violation for error logging, POST /api/onboarding/save persists to fact_ledger.

minor.issue: NameError: name 'client' is not defined in server.py shutdown handler. This occurs during hot reload but doesn't affect runtime functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: INTEGRATION_FACT_DERIVATIONS maps 5 integration signals to fact_keys with confidence levels
VERIFIED: resolve_facts reads from observation_events table with CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD check
VERIFIED: resolve_facts processes sources in correct order: Supabase tables → observation_events → fact_ledger
VERIFIED: persist_facts_batch is async function with params: supabase_client, user_id, fact_map, source
VERIFIED: log_fact_resolution_violation exists with params: user_id, fact_key, context
VERIFIED: build_known_facts_prompt separates CONFIRMED FACTS from UNCONFIRMED FACTS sections
VERIFIED: POST /api/onboarding/save imports persist_facts_batch and ONBOARDING_FIELD_TO_FACT
VERIFIED: POST /api/onboarding/save calls await persist_facts_batch for answered fields
VERIFIED: GET /api/facts/resolve endpoint returns 401/403 without auth
VERIFIED: POST /api/facts/confirm endpoint returns 401/403 without auth
VERIFIED: GET /api/business-profile/context returns resolved_fields with confidence
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js has resolvedFieldsMap state and setResolvedFieldsMap
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard renderField checks .confirmed status for badge display
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard shows 'confirmed' badge (emerald) and 'detected'/'from profile' badge (amber)
VERIFIED: Backend starts cleanly with updated fact_resolution module
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified Global Fact Authority enhancements. Key additions: (1) CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.75 for integration-derived facts, (2) INTEGRATION_FACT_DERIVATIONS maps crm.contact_count, crm.pipeline_value, finance.revenue, finance.employee_count, calendar.team_size_inferred to fact_keys, (3) resolve_facts reads observation_events in LAYER 2, (4) persist_facts_batch for batch persistence from onboarding, (5) build_known_facts_prompt separates CONFIRMED FACTS (DO NOT RE-ASK) from UNCONFIRMED FACTS (CONFIRM ONLY), (6) log_fact_resolution_violation logs system errors, (7) POST /api/onboarding/save persists answered fields to fact_ledger, (8) OnboardingWizard shows 'confirmed' badge (emerald) and 'detected'/'from profile' badge (amber).
